meta.title: DEF CON 29 ICS Village - Meet Can Kilic -  Do We Really Want to Live in the Cyberpunk World
meta.description: What are the possible future threats when it comes to cyber physical systems? Human augmentations, insulin pumps, and brain computer interfaces are inevitable, but how will their security and possible incidents affect our world?
